minimum_viable_experiment: Prepare a small activation severity series and evaluate yield-normalized gravimetric and volumetric performance.
controls: ['fixed carbonization protocol', 'baseline precursor', 'repeat cells or repeated electrodes']
success_criteria: ['effect direction remains stable under frozen protocol', 'primary endpoint difference exceeds measurement noise', 'result can be interpreted by at least one measured descriptor']
kill_criteria: ['no controllable variable can be isolated', 'core measurement cannot be repeated reliably', 'full collision search finds direct same-question same-protocol paper']
